fields.narrative_intro: *A deflated person and a high-strung person discuss Claude Code's token bloat at a tech keynote where the demo robot has gone rogue.*
fields.panel1:
[setup]
HIGH-STRUNG PERSON: "Claude Code is answering our prompt!"
DEFLATED PERSON: "It sent 32,800 tokens first. Just warming up."
fields.panel2:
[build]
HIGH-STRUNG PERSON: "Warming up for what?!"
DEFLATED PERSON: "Twenty-seven tool schemas. Three reminder blocks. You know."
fields.panel3:
[pivot]
HIGH-STRUNG PERSON: "The prompt was one word: 'OK'!"
DEFLATED PERSON: "It wrote 53,000 cache tokens. Also billed at premium."
fields.panel4:
[silent reaction]
[Visual: The demo robot behind them has frozen mid-rampage, holding a tiny invoice. Both characters stare at the robot. The invoice reads '90,000 tokens' in large numerals. A single spotlight flickers overhead.]
fields.panel5:
[punch]
HIGH-STRUNG PERSON: "Did it at least score better than OpenCode?"
DEFLATED PERSON: "Identical benchmarks. Every single one."
fields.panel6:
[button]
[Visual: The rogue demo robot quietly hands them a second invoice labeled 'Cache Write Surcharge.' It has also written 'OK' on a tiny chalkboard. The chalkboard cost $47.]

narrative_summary: Claude Code burns 32,800 tokens of scaffolding and 53,000 premium cache tokens just to reply 'OK,' matching OpenCode on every benchmark — so the punchline is the invoice the rogue demo robot hands them for the privilege.
rationale: Candidate 2 edges out Candidate 5 on surprise and punchline construction: the double-invoice button (first the 90k-token bill, then a separate 'Cache Write Surcharge' with the '$47 chalkboard' gag) escalates rather than merely restating, and the specificity of 53,000 premium cache tokens adds a layer of absurdity that Candidate 5's cleaner robot-says-OK closer doesn't quite match in comedic density.
story_title: Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading the prompt; OpenCode sends 7k
place: at a tech keynote where the demo robot has gone rogue
hat_pair: foam thought bubble hat with a tiny glowing question mark floating inside it
